caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, and glasses. He wears large black headphones and a voluminous, light-gray wig styled in a high peak. In front of him is a professional microphone with a black windscreen. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items on hangers, including some with "LEE" visible on the tags. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left reads "STUDIO PODCAST" and one on the right reads "GOSS TALK JOY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, shifting his head slightly and changing his facial expression from a smile to a more neutral, attentive look while looking toward someone off-camera.
